understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to occupy every '+' goal tile simultaneously with selectable pieces by moving and switching between them, completing all levels within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in pixel coordinates (3px per cell). The SELECT action (CLICK) should switch control to another selectable piece, but it repeatedly failed, perhaps due to incorrect coordinate format or because the target piece was blocked/walled off. Pushing likely occurs when an adjacent block is pushed along with the selected piece. Walls block movement, but specific interactions were not fully discovered. The step budget depletes with each action, and the level ends when all goals are covered.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to occupy every '+' goal tile simultaneously with selectable pieces by moving and switching between them, completing all levels within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in pixel coordinates (3px per cell). The SELECT action (CLICK) should switch control to another selectable piece, but it repeatedly failed, perhaps due to incorrect coordinate format or because the target piece was blocked/walled off. Pushing likely occurs when an adjacent block is pushed along with the selected piece. Walls block movement, but specific interactions were not fully discovered. The step budget depletes with each action, and the level ends when all goals are covered.
